identity.name: Skimly
identity.core_value: Universal AI cognition layer. Everything you read makes you smarter forever.
identity.archetype: Organic & Earthy (Trust, Growth, Calm) mixed with Swiss Clarity

rules: Use 'Fraunces' or a similar soft serif for all H1-H3 to evoke the 'book/knowledge' feel.
Body text must have relaxed line-height (leading-relaxed) for readability.
Use italics for emphasis in headings to create an 'editorial' voice.

usage: Background is NOT pure white (#FFFFFF). Use #FDFCF8 (Warm Paper) for Light Mode.
Primary color (#2E5C55 - Deep Forest) is for high-priority actions and active states.
Accent color (#D97757 - Terracotta) is for 'sparks' of insight or notifications.
Borders should be subtle (#E6E4DC) to mimic the edge of paper.
Avoid gradients. Use solid, matte colors.

texture.noise: url("data:image/svg+xml,%3Csvg viewBox='0 0 200 200' xmlns='http://www.w3.org/2000/svg'%3E%3Cfilter id='noiseFilter'%3E%3CfeTurbulence type='fractalNoise' baseFrequency='0.65' numOctaves='3' stitchTiles='stitch'/%3E%3C/filter%3E%3Crect width='100%25' height='100%25' filter='url(%23noiseFilter)' opacity='0.03'/%3E%3C/svg%3E")
texture.glass: backdrop-blur-xl backdrop-saturate-150 bg-white/70 border border-white/20 shadow-sm

buttons.primary: bg-primary text-primary-foreground hover:bg-primary/90 rounded-full px-8 py-6 text-base font-medium transition-all hover:scale-[1.02] active:scale-[0.98]
buttons.secondary: bg-secondary text-secondary-foreground hover:bg-secondary/80 rounded-full px-6 py-4 text-sm font-medium
buttons.ghost: hover:bg-muted text-foreground/80 hover:text-foreground rounded-lg px-4 py-2

cards.base: bg-card text-card-foreground border border-border shadow-soft rounded-2xl p-6 relative overflow-hidden group

inputs.base: bg-transparent border-b border-border focus:border-primary focus:ring-0 rounded-none px-0 py-4 text-lg placeholder:text-muted-foreground/50 transition-colors

navigation.header: fixed top-0 w-full z-50 bg-background/80 backdrop-blur-md border-b border-border/40 h-16 flex items-center justify-between px-6
navigation.sidebar: fixed left-0 top-16 h-[calc(100vh-4rem)] w-64 bg-background border-r border-border/40 p-4 flex flex-col gap-2

hero_background.desc: Abstract paper texture for hero background overlay (low opacity)

workspace_calm.desc: Minimalist workspace with plants, evoking calm productivity

focused_reading.desc: Person focused on reading/tablet, representing the user

abstract_concept.desc: White gauze/textile, representing the 'fabric' of knowledge

accessibility.focus: Visible focus rings using ring-offset-2 ring-2 ring-primary.

instructions_to_main_agent: 1. THEME SETUP: Update tailwind.config.js with the specific colors provided in 'colors.palette'. Do not use default Shadcn slate/zinc colors.
2. FONT SETUP: Import 'Fraunces' and 'Geist Sans' (or Inter) from Google Fonts. Apply them globally.
3. LAYOUT: For the Landing Page, use the 'Swiss Grid' approach. Big typography, lots of whitespace. Do not use standard centered hero sections.
4. DASHBOARD: Use the 'Bento Grid' layout. Cards should look like pieces of paper (subtle border, very soft shadow).
5. COMPONENTS: Customize Shadcn components. Remove default heavy borders/shadows. Make them feel 'organic' and 'light'.
6. IMAGES: Use the provided image URLs for specific sections. Use the 'texture' noise overlay on the body background.
7. DATA-TESTID: Add data-testid to all interactive elements (buttons, inputs, links).
universal_guidelines: Avoid 'AI Slop' - generic centered layouts and purple gradients.
Use 2-3x more spacing than typical designs.
Never use transparent backgrounds without a blur or scrim.
